title: MythicMons
body:
![logo](https://i.imgur.com/Immw983.png)

Join MythicMons, a vibrant Minecraft 1.21.1 Cobblemon server where Pokémon and adventure collide in a legendary experience!

Test your skills in the Battle Factory with rented teams, hunt for intriguing Pokémon, assert dominance by climbing the ranked ladder, and explore the mysterious Ultra Space! Team up for thrilling Raids against powerful bosses for epic rewards. With great Community, regular Events, and exciting Giveaways, MythicMons offers endless fun! Jump in and become part of the legend!

IP: MythicMons.com

Store: https://store.mythicmons.com

Discord: https://discord.gg/cSXrcBCq9U
